ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the weather station where the data was recorded */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded for the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded for the day */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded for the day */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded for the day */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Cloud cover recorded for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature trend analysis */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the weather station for the trend analysis */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the trend analysis period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the trend analysis period */,
  "average_tmax" REAL /* Average maximum temperature over the analysis period */,
  "average_tmin" REAL /* Average minimum temperature over the analysis period */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed temperature trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., linear, exponential, cyclical) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend analysis (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_trends_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record the metadata is associated with */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "record_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data recorded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
